parts.text: Agents open pull requests all day now. The good ones are green. The rest just look green.
mergegate puts one gate in front of main. An agent's change only lands if it is provably done.

An autonomous agent pushes its change straight at main. mergegate runs every gate, finds a missing spec and a failing test, and refuses the merge on the spot. The agent fixes it properly, references the spec — and the very same push lands clean.
mergegate. Provably done, or it doesn't touch main. From deemwar.

Type "git commit -aqm 'fix: raise retry ceiling to 5 (spec 14)'"

captions.text: An agent's PR, pushed straight at main.
✘ BLOCKED — no spec, tests red. The merge is refused.
Fixed properly, spec referenced → the same push LANDS on main.
